Name: [Volatility] Sample δ
Desc: Gain <color=#2BAD00>50 points</color>. However, defeated enemies may <color=#CF4029>summon Ether Phantoms</color> upon death.
Desc2: Emitting a mysterious and captivating essence, these powerful samples attract enemies, but if you can get them out of the Hollow, you stand to make a considerable profit.
